title: Athega (corvette group)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Athega''''' was the designation assigned to a group of eleven [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] which served with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Fleet]]. At some point during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], while passing through the [[Athega system]] with only light fighter escort, they were [[Battle near Athega|attacked]] by a group of [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]], [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] and the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Aggressor (Victory-class)|''Aggressor'']].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
While the occurrence of the space battle depicted in this mission, as well as the participants, is C-[[canon]], the outcome depends on the actions of the player and is therefore indeterminate. For lack of other canonical information it should be assumed that no lasting effect (such as the destruction of a starship) resulted from the battle.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]''

[[Category:CR90 corvettes|*]]
